title: Provider
description: An organization providing services for expats and retirees in a specific destination.

id.description: The unique identifier for the provider.

destination.description: The id of the destination this provider operates in.

name.description: The name of the provider organization.

website.description: The official website URL of the provider.

contact.description: Contact information such as phone number or email address.

address.description: The physical address of the provider (optional).

description.description: A detailed description of the services offered by the provider.
examples: A premier global immigration firm specializing in complex residency pathways and high-level permits.

category.description: The service category of the provider.
